tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerAcceptGrant.acceptGrant
tools.description: Accepts the specified grant.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCheckInLicense.checkInLicense
tools.description: Checks in the specified license. Check in a license when it is no longer in use.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCheckoutBorrowLicense.checkoutBorrowLicense
tools.description: Checks out the specified license for offline use.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCheckoutLicense.checkoutLicense
tools.description:
Checks out the specified license.

If the account that created the license is the same that is performing the check out, you must specify the account as the beneficiary.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateGrant.createGrant
tools.description: Creates a grant for the specified license. A grant shares the use of license entitlements with a specific Amazon Web Services account, an organization, or an organizational unit (OU). For more information, see Granted licenses in License Manager in the License Manager User Guide.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateGrantVersion.createGrantVersion
tools.description: Creates a new version of the specified grant. For more information, see Granted licenses in License Manager in the License Manager User Guide.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateLicense.createLicense
tools.description: Creates a license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateLicenseConfiguration.createLicenseConfiguration
tools.description:
Creates a license configuration.

A license configuration is an abstraction of a customer license agreement that can be consumed and enforced by License Manager. Components include specifications for the license type (licensing by instance, socket, CPU, or vCPU), allowed tenancy (shared tenancy, Dedicated Instance, Dedicated Host, or all of these), license affinity to host (how long a license must be associated with a host), and the number of licenses purchased and used.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateLicenseConversionTaskForResource.createLicenseConversionTaskForResource
tools.description: Creates a new license conversion task.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateLicenseManagerReportGenerator.createLicenseManagerReportGenerator
tools.description: Creates a report generator.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateLicenseVersion.createLicenseVersion
tools.description: Creates a new version of the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerCreateToken.createToken
tools.description:
Creates a long-lived token.

A refresh token is a JWT token used to get an access token. With an access token, you can call AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity to get role credentials that you can use to call License Manager to manage the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerDeleteGrant.deleteGrant
tools.description: Deletes the specified grant.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerDeleteLicense.deleteLicense
tools.description: Deletes the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerDeleteLicenseConfiguration.deleteLicenseConfiguration
tools.description:
Deletes the specified license configuration.

You cannot delete a license configuration that is in use.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerDeleteLicenseManagerReportGenerator.deleteLicenseManagerReportGenerator
tools.description:
Deletes the specified report generator.

This action deletes the report generator, which stops it from generating future reports. The action cannot be reversed. It has no effect on the previous reports from this generator.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerDeleteToken.deleteToken
tools.description: Deletes the specified token. Must be called in the license home Region.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerExtendLicenseConsumption.extendLicenseConsumption
tools.description: Extends the expiration date for license consumption.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetAccessToken.getAccessToken
tools.description: Gets a temporary access token to use with AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity. Access tokens are valid for one hour.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetGrant.getGrant
tools.description: Gets detailed information about the specified grant.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetLicense.getLicense
tools.description: Gets detailed information about the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetLicenseConfiguration.getLicenseConfiguration
tools.description: Gets detailed information about the specified license configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetLicenseConversionTask.getLicenseConversionTask
tools.description: Gets information about the specified license type conversion task.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetLicenseManagerReportGenerator.getLicenseManagerReportGenerator
tools.description: Gets information about the specified report generator.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetLicenseUsage.getLicenseUsage
tools.description: Gets detailed information about the usage of the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerGetServiceSettings.getServiceSettings
tools.description: Gets the License Manager settings for the current Region.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListAssociationsForLicenseConfiguration.listAssociationsForLicenseConfiguration
tools.description:
Lists the resource associations for the specified license configuration.

Resource associations need not consume licenses from a license configuration. For example, an AMI or a stopped instance might not consume a license (depending on the license rules).

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListDistributedGrants.listDistributedGrants
tools.description: Lists the grants distributed for the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListFailuresForLicenseConfigurationOperations.listFailuresForLicenseConfigurationOperations
tools.description: Lists the license configuration operations that failed.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenseConfigurations.listLicenseConfigurations
tools.description: Lists the license configurations for your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenseConversionTasks.listLicenseConversionTasks
tools.description: Lists the license type conversion tasks for your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenseManagerReportGenerators.listLicenseManagerReportGenerators
tools.description: Lists the report generators for your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenses.listLicenses
tools.description: Lists the licenses for your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenseSpecificationsForResource.listLicenseSpecificationsForResource
tools.description: Describes the license configurations for the specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListLicenseVersions.listLicenseVersions
tools.description: Lists all versions of the specified license.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListReceivedGrants.listReceivedGrants
tools.description: Lists grants that are received. Received grants are grants created while specifying the recipient as this Amazon Web Services account, your organization, or an organizational unit (OU) to which this member account belongs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListReceivedGrantsForOrganization.listReceivedGrantsForOrganization
tools.description: Lists the grants received for all accounts in the organization.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListReceivedLicenses.listReceivedLicenses
tools.description: Lists received licenses.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListReceivedLicensesForOrganization.listReceivedLicensesForOrganization
tools.description: Lists the licenses received for all accounts in the organization.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListResourceInventory.listResourceInventory
tools.description: Lists resources managed using Systems Manager inventory.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags for the specified license configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListTokens.listTokens
tools.description: Lists your tokens.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerListUsageForLicenseConfiguration.listUsageForLicenseConfiguration
tools.description: Lists all license usage records for a license configuration, displaying license consumption details by resource at a selected point in time. Use this action to audit the current license consumption for any license inventory and configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerRejectGrant.rejectGrant
tools.description: Rejects the specified grant.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerTagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Adds the specified tags to the specified license configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes the specified tags from the specified license configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerUpdateLicenseConfiguration.updateLicenseConfiguration
tools.description: Modifies the attributes of an existing license configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerUpdateLicenseManagerReportGenerator.updateLicenseManagerReportGenerator
tools.description:
Updates a report generator.

After you make changes to a report generator, it starts generating new reports within 60 minutes of being updated.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerUpdateLicenseSpecificationsForResource.updateLicenseSpecificationsForResource
tools.description:
Adds or removes the specified license configurations for the specified Amazon Web Services resource.

You can update the license specifications of AMIs, instances, and hosts. You cannot update the license specifications for launch templates and CloudFormation templates, as they send license configurations to the operation that creates the resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsLicenseManagerUpdateServiceSettings.updateServiceSettings
tools.description: Updates License Manager settings for the current Region.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
